name: melmetal
flavor_texts: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
At the end of its life-span, Melmetal will rust and fall apart. The small shards left behind will eventually be reborn as Meltan.
Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon.
text: Melmetal is the Hex Nut Pokémon. It is a steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: iron-fist. Base stats — HP: 135, Attack: 143, Defense: 143, Sp. Atk: 80, Sp. Def: 65, Speed: 34. Evolution line: melmetal. Lore: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years. At the end of its life-span, Melmetal will rust and fall apart. The small shards left behind will eventually be reborn as Meltan. Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon.
